ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cookies" (
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie */,
  "cookie_name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie */,
  "cookie_type" TEXT /* Type of cookie */,
  "technical_requirement" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cookie has a technical requirement (true/false) */,
  "first_party" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cookie is first-party (true/false) */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain for which the cookie is applicable */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path for which the cookie is applicable */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the cookie */,
  "retention_period" TEXT /* Retention period of the cookie */,
  "cookie_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the cookie (e.g., DAAD, Google LLC) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Description of the purpose and interest of the cookie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_consent" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving consent */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie related to this consent */,
  "consent_status" INTEGER /* Status of the consent (true for given, false for refused) */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when consent was given or updated */,
  "consent_status_update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for updating the consent status */,
  "consent_status_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who updated the consent status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_consent_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_consent_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_consent_consent_status_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("consent_status_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user, compliance officer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie provider (e.g., DAAD, Google LLC) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of cookie provider (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the cookie provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie that this record relates to */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the cookie consent banner */,
  "total_consent_given" INTEGER /* Total number of consents given for this cookie */,
  "total_consent_refused" INTEGER /* Total number of refusals for this cookie */,
  "views_last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the views were last updated */,
  "consent_last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the consent data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., consent updated, cookie settings changed) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the action */,
  "affected_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user affected by the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_affected_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("affected_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., display_banner, cookie_duration) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting (e.g., true/false, number of days) */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user, compliance officer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., manage consent, view analytics) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
